changes: Eos and Selene can now use Embrace on non-party members when set to Obey.
Scholar is now counted as a separate job from Summoner when determining the speed at which the limit break gauge is filled.
Summoner is now counted as a separate job from Scholar when determining the speed at which the limit break gauge is filled.
The Sic and Obey pet commands can now be activated without a target present.
Pets will remain set to either Sic or Obey even when re-summoned (reverts to Sic upon logging out).
When using the Sic or Obey commands while a pet is moving, queued actions will not be canceled if no other commands are given.
Eos and Selene will now continue to follow their owners even when switching between the Sic and Obey commands.

new_content.name: Labyrinth of the Ancients
new_content.description: Alliance members will now be visible during the initial cutscene.

new_content.name: Dhorme Chimera
new_content.description: Trial now available via Duty Finder for players who have completed 'A Relic Reborn'.
new_content.location: Coerthas Central Highlands - The Weeping Saint (X:31, Y:7)

new_content.name: Hydra
new_content.description: Trial now available via Duty Finder for players who have completed 'A Relic Reborn'.

new_content.name: A Relic Reborn
new_content.description: Quest required to unlock access to Dhorme Chimera and Hydra trials.

new_content.name: Duty Finder
new_content.description: System additions include new trials, clear selection button, and Melee/Ranged DPS requirements for Wolves' Den.

new_content.name: Free Company Interface
new_content.description: New features include filtered Activity Notices, 'Applications' under Hierarchy Settings, and new Company Profile categories (Focus, Seeking, Active, Recruitment).

new_content.name: Market Boards and Summoning Bells
new_content.description: Added to residential districts (Mist, Lavender Beds, The Goblet) and Revenant's Toll.

new_content.name: Ready Check
new_content.description: System command to confirm party member status before or during a duty.

new_content.name: Wish List
new_content.description: Market board feature allowing players to register up to 10 items.

new_content.name: Waymarks
new_content.description: System allowing players to mark areas on the field visible to party and alliance members.

new_content.name: Mount/Minion Roulette
new_content.description: System actions to summon a random mount or minion.

new_content.name: New Adventurer Status
new_content.description: Online status for characters with less than 20 hours of playtime and 80 achievement points.

housing.name: Market boards
housing.description: Added to the residential districts (Mist, Lavender Beds, The Goblet).

housing.name: Summoning bells
housing.description: Added to the residential districts (Mist, Lavender Beds, The Goblet).

housing.name: Company chest
housing.description: Furnishing placed inside an estate; will now display your free company's crest.

housing.name: Moogle letter box
housing.description: Furnishing that will now light up when mail arrives.
